description: Unified campus card service for balance checks, transaction history, recharges, and card management.

tools.name: query_balance
tools.description: Retrieve the current balance and currency of a campus card account.

userId.description: The unique identifier of the campus card account.
The unique identifier of the campus card account.

balance.description: Current available balance on the card.

currency.description: ISO-4217 currency code for the balance (e.g., CNY).

tools.name: query_transactions
tools.description: Fetch paginated transaction history for a campus card within an optional date range.

userId.description: The unique identifier of the campus card account.

startDate.description: Start date in YYYY-MM-DD format; inclusive.

endDate.description: End date in YYYY-MM-DD format; inclusive.

merchantName.description: Name of the merchant or location where the transaction occurred.

date.description: Transaction timestamp in YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss format.

amount.description: Transaction amount; negative for expenses, positive for refunds/recharges.

balanceAfter.description: Account balance immediately after the transaction.

tools.name: query_basic_info
tools.description: Obtain status and personal details of a campus card after password verification.

userId.description: The unique identifier of the campus card account.
The unique identifier of the campus card account.

statusText.description: Human-readable description of the current card status.

tools.name: recharge
tools.description: Add funds to a campus card using a supported payment method.

userId.description: The unique identifier of the campus card account.

amount.description: Recharge amount in the card's currency.

paymentMethod.description: Payment channel used for the recharge.

userId.description: The unique identifier of the campus card account.

transactionId.description: Unique identifier for the recharge transaction.

tools.name: update_info
tools.description: Update optional profile fields of a campus card after password verification.

userId.description: The unique identifier of the campus card account.

phone.description: New phone number to associate with the account.

email.description: New email address to associate with the account.

address.description: New residential or office address to associate with the account.

userId.description: The unique identifier of the campus card account.

success.description: True if at least one field was updated.

updatedFields.description: List of field names that were successfully modified.

tools.name: lostCard
tools.description: Report the campus card as lost to freeze it and prevent unauthorized use.

userId.description: The unique identifier of the campus card account.
The unique identifier of the campus card account.

success.description: True if the card was successfully flagged as lost.

status.description: Numeric status code after the operation (same encoding as query_basic_info).
